info.title: ComicVine API
info.description: ComicVine is the largest comic book database in the world, providing comprehensive data on comic book characters, issues, volumes, publishers, story arcs, teams, and more. It covers DC Comics, Marvel, and all other publishers. The API provides read-only access to this data, requiring an API key for authentication.

get.description: Search for characters, issues, volumes, publishers, and other resources by query string.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query string.

parameters.name: resources
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of resource types to search (e.g., 'issue,character,volume').

parameters.name: subscriber_only
parameters.description: Filter subscriber-only content.

200.description: Successful search results

get.description: Returns a paginated list of comic book characters. Supports filtering and sorting.

200.description: Successful response with list of characters

get.summary: Get a single character by ID
get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific character.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique resource ID in the format '4005-{id}'.

200.description: Successful response with character details

get.description: Returns a paginated list of comic book issues.

200.description: Successful response with list of issues

get.summary: Get a single issue by ID
get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific comic book issue.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique resource ID in the format '4000-{id}'.

200.description: Successful response with issue details

get.description: Returns a paginated list of promotional items.

200.description: Successful response

get.description: Returns the list of all available resource types in the API.

200.description: Successful response with list of resource types

apiKey.name: api_key
apiKey.description: API key obtained from registering at https://comicvine.gamespot.com/api/

format.name: format
format.description: The response data format. Options: xml, json, jsonp.

fieldList.name: field_list
fieldList.description: Comma-delimited list of fields to include in the response.

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Number of results per page (default 100, max 100).

offset.name: offset
offset.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

sort.name: sort
sort.description: Sort results by field. Format: 'field_name:asc' or 'field_name:desc'.

filter.name: filter
filter.description: Filter results. Format: 'field_name:value' for single filter, or 'field1:value1,field2:value2' for multiple.

limit.description: The limit applied to this request.

offset.description: The offset applied to this request.

number_of_page_results.description: Number of results in this page.

number_of_total_results.description: Total number of results matching the query.

status_code.description: Status code. 1=OK, 100=Invalid API Key, 101=Object Not Found, 102=URL Format Error, 103=jsonp requires json_callback, 104=Filter Error, 105=Subscriber Only.

results.description: The result data. Array for list endpoints, object for single-resource endpoints.
